overview: Wild turkeys are increasingly adapting to suburban environments, often foraging in parking lots and obstructing traffic. KTVU +1 These urban turkeys can become highly aggressive towards pedestrians and may block vehicles to protect their territory, particularly in California suburbs. Reddit +1 Authorities advise against feeding them to prevent habituation and recommend using visual deterrents to keep them away from residential areas. Mass.gov
